Cross-venue options terminal

One terminal. Every venue.

Trade options across Deribit, OKX, Binance, Bybit, Thalex, Derive, Coincall, and Gate.io — from a single surface.

Request AccessSee the terminal
surface.live · tick-by-tick

a real volatility surface — not a screenshot. tilt, skew, term and venue context, recalculated tick-by-tick.

Normalized quotes. Best edge per strike, tagged by venue.

The terminal

Surface. Chain. Portfolio.

Three depths of the same market: shape, price, and exposure.

01

Surface

Cross-venue IV surface. Tick-by-tick.

On screen

Eight venues. One smile.

02

Chain

Normalized quotes. Best edge per strike.

On screen

Deribit · OKX · Binance · Bybit · Thalex · Derive · Coincall · Gate.io.

03

Portfolio

Greeks aggregated across venues. Real PnL.

On screen

Per-venue risk. Per-strategy view.

Built for desks

Cross-venue from the first quote.

Normalized prices. Sub-second refresh. Venue-aware routing.

Cross-venue lenses

Four lenses. Every venue.

One surface

Cross-venue regime

Surface

Live IV smile and term across every venue.

One shape. All books.

Directional risk

Skew

Wing stress and put/call imbalance, ranked.

Find the venue with the cheapest hedge.

Expiry edge

Term

Tenor structure, event humps, calendar spreads.

Spot the venue with the steepest curve.

Execution edge

Route

Best executable price across all eight venues.

Quote · spread · latency · in one row.

Cross-venue mechanics

Every venue. Every quote. One schema.

Normalized quotes

Every venue speaks the same units, conventions, and tick scales.

Compare Deribit and Bybit on the same axis. No spreadsheet glue.

Best-venue routing

Live spread, depth, and latency budget per strike, per venue.

See which book fills first — before you send the order.

Venue-tagged feeds

Every quote, fill, and greek carries its source venue end-to-end.

Risk views split per venue automatically. Reconciliation is free.

Failover in the UI

Degraded feeds show as degraded — never as silent stale state.

Health is a first-class surface, not a hidden log line.

Engineering proof

Built to be checked.

No fabricated metrics. No anonymous quotes. The claims on this page are properties of the system — verify each one inside the terminal.

Degraded shows as degraded

Venue health is a first-class surface. A stale feed flags in the UI the moment it degrades — never silent stale state.

One schema, venue-tagged

Every quote, fill, and greek is normalized once and carries its source venue end-to-end, so risk views reconcile by construction.

Counts come from code

Venue and coverage numbers on this page are derived from the same data the terminal ships with — they cannot drift from reality.
